proof: not S.0 = choose(k0: S) { not S.0 = k0 }
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0) { T0.0 * x0 = T0.0 }[S](choose(k0: S) { not S.0 = k0 })
function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[S](choose(k0: S) { not S.0 = k0 })
function[T0: Monoid](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: T0) { x0.suc != x1 or x2 * x2.pow(x0) = x2.pow(x1) }[S](choose(k0: Nat) { k0.suc = n }, n, S.0)
function(x0: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { k0.suc = x0 } or Nat.0 = x0 }(n)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0) { T0.0 * x0 = T0.0 }[S](S.0.pow(choose(k0: Nat) { k0.suc = n }))
function(x0: S) { S.0.pow(n) != S.0 * x0 }(S.0.pow(choose(k0: Nat) { k0.suc = n }))
